sourceProvenance.excerpt: DJ-1 inhibition reshapes tumor microenvironment and potentiates immune checkpoint inhibitors.

Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) can essentially treat cancer but only in a small subset of patients. Treatment strategies capable of effectively and robustly sensitizing refractory patients to ICIs represent a highly coveted yet unmet clinical need. In this study, we identified DJ-1 as a negative T cell regulator. DJ-1 knockout boosts antitumor immunity and significantly potentiates PD-1 and TIM-3 blockades in murine cancer models. Single-cell sequencing of tumor-infiltrating CD45+ cells rev
